errors.USERNAME_CHANGE_RESTRICTED: You can only change your username every 30 days. Please wait {{days_remaining}} more days.
errors.PROGRAM_ALREADY_EXISTS: A program with this name already exists in this organization.
errors.PROGRAM_MUST_HAVE_ASSET: A program must have at least one asset.
errors.PROGRAM_INACTIVE: Reports can only be submitted to active programs.
errors.NOT_YOUR_COMMENT: You can only update your own comments.
errors.CANNOT_EDIT_DELETED_PROGRAM: Cannot edit content for a deleted program.
errors.NOT_ORG_MEMBER: You are not a member of this organization.
errors.ORGANIZATION_ALREADY_EXISTS: An organization with this name (or a similar one) already exists.
errors.PROGRAM_NAME_TOO_SHORT: Program name must be at least {{min_length}} characters long.
errors.PROGRAM_NAME_TOO_LONG: Program name must be at most {{max_length}} characters long.
errors.PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION_TOO_SHORT: Description must be at least {{min_length}} characters long.
errors.PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION_TOO_LONG: Description must be at most {{max_length}} characters long.
errors.ASSET_DESCRIPTION_TOO_LONG: Asset description must be at most 1000 characters long.
errors.REPORT_TITLE_TOO_SHORT: Title must be at least {{min_length}} characters long.
errors.REPORT_TITLE_TOO_LONG: Title must be at most {{max_length}} characters long.
errors.REPORT_SEVERITY_DECIMALS: Severity must have at most one decimal place.
errors.REPORT_DESCRIPTION_TOO_SHORT: Description must be at least {{min_length}} characters long.
errors.REPORT_DESCRIPTION_TOO_LONG: Description must be at most {{max_length}} characters long.
errors.COMMENT_CONTENT_TOO_LONG: Comment content must be at most {{max_length}} characters long.
errors.USER_USERNAME_TOO_SHORT: Username must be at least {{min_length}} characters long.
errors.USER_USERNAME_TOO_LONG: Username must be at most {{max_length}} characters long.
errors.USER_USERNAME_RESERVED: Username is reserved and cannot be used.
errors.USER_PROFILE_INFO_TOO_LONG: Profile info must be at most {{max_length}} characters long.
errors.SELECT_AT_LEAST_ONE_ASSET: Please select at least one asset.
errors.INVALID_FILE_TYPE_OR_NAME: Invalid file type or name too long. Allowed: images (JPEG, PNG, GIF) with names up to 255 characters.
